segments.text: Welcome to VibeOps, the agentic development onboarding system.
We are not building AI to replace developers.
We are building AI to make developers superhuman.
In the next few minutes, you'll learn a new way
to think about software development,
one where human judgment, not coding speed,
is the superpower.
Here's the fundamental insight.
In traditional development, the bottleneck was coding speed.
How fast can I type?
How fast can I implement?
But in eugenic development, the bottleneck
has shifted to human judgment.
How quickly can I verify what's right?
This changes everything about how we work.
VIBOPS is built on four pillars.
First, AI partnership over tool usage.
Treat AI as a thinking partner, not autocomplete.
Second, verification over implementation.
Prove before you build.
Third, orchestration over coding.
Guide intelligent systems instead of writing every line.
Fourth, emergence over planning.
Create conditions for solutions to arise
through collaboration.
The VIBOPS development cycle has four phases.
Envision, where humans define the vision and constraints.
Explore, where human and AI collaborate
to evaluate options.
Execute, where AI implements based on verified boundaries.
And evolve, where we learn and improve continuously.
This cycle repeats, getting better each iteration.
Proof beats progress.
In the old way, you coded first and tested later,
hoping things worked.
In the VIBOPS way, you verify first and generate second.
Tests and specifications come before implementation.
This isn't slower, it's faster, because you catch problems
before they're built.
This repo takes you through five phases.
Phase one, absorb the philosophy.
Phase two, learn to frame problems
with executable acceptance criteria.
Phase three, model security threats before writing code.
Phase four, generate code through AI partnership.
Phase five, verify and observe
with three layers of validation.
Each phase has a gate you must pass to proceed.
Everyone starts at phase one, the philosophy foundation.
You'll read the agentic development manifesto,
study how traditional and agentic approaches differ
using real examples, then pass an interactive assessment.
You need 80% to advance.
No progression without verified understanding.
In phases two through four, you learn the core workflow.
Frame problems using given when then acceptance criteria
instead of vague requirements.
Model threats using the stride framework
before any code is generated.
Then partner with AI to generate code
within verified, secure boundaries.
Phase five is where it all comes together.
Three verification layers.
Security, static analysis, secret scanning,
dependency audits, quality, unit tests,
integration tests, end-to-end coverage,
deployment, health checks, canary releases,
rollback testing.
Remember, shipping code is easy.
Shipping verified code is the only part that matters.
Getting started is simple. Clone the repo, run the on-board script, and choose Start
Vibops Tutorial from the interactive menu. The system tracks your progress, enforces
gates, and guides you through each phase at your own pace. The methodology is AI-agnostic,
but this repo is built natively on Clawed code.
The repo comes loaded with tools, built-in verification pipelines for security, quality,
and deployment, JSON-based progress tracking that remembers where you left off, a daily
checklist for VibOp's practices, and Cloud Code integration, Cloud.md conventions, agentic
workflows, and project setup scripts baked right in.
Start your agentic development journey today, clone the repo, run the on-board script, and
transform how you build software.
The bottleneck has shifted.
Your judgment is the superpower.
Welcome to VibeOps.
